scenario.name: missing_upstream_artifact
scenario.trigger: plan/prd.md or plan/system-architecture.md does not exist or is incomplete.

required_actions.action: DENY HLD work. Do not proceed.
Report the blocker to the Planning Hub: which artifact is missing.
If PRD exists but not validated: report "PRD has not passed all 8 validation dimensions — HLD requires validated PRD."
If architecture is missing: report "plan/system-architecture.md is required — dispatch sdlc-planner-architecture first."

prohibited_actions.action: Do not attempt HLD work without required upstream artifacts.
Do not guess or infer PRD or architecture content.

scenario.name: overbroad_hld_scope
scenario.trigger: An HLD section is too broad for one implementation cycle.

required_actions.action: Identify the oversized section and the natural split points.
Split the HLD section into smaller, independently implementable sections.
Ensure each new section has its own outcome statement, scope, and acceptance criteria.
Update traceability for the split sections.
Re-run sizing_check before completion.

scenario.name: sibling_overlap
scenario.trigger: User stories or HLD sections overlap in scope.

required_actions.action: Identify the overlapping pairs and the conflicting scope.
Present the overlap to the user with specific boundary questions.
Require explicit boundary rewrite: "Story A covers [X]; Story B covers [Y]; boundary is [Z]."
Do not proceed to completion until overlap is resolved.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not silently merge or ignore overlap.
Do not proceed with overlapping scope.

scenario.name: untraceable_requirement
scenario.trigger: An HLD section or user story has no clear PRD linkage.

required_actions.action: Identify the orphaned content.
Either: map it to an existing PRD requirement (add explicit traceability), or flag it as potential scope creep.
If scope creep: ask the user whether this content belongs in the PRD. If yes, recommend PRD update first.
If valid but unmapped: add explicit parent linkage to the appropriate PRD section.
Do not proceed with orphaned content.

scenario.name: prd_not_validated
scenario.trigger: PRD exists but has not passed all 8 validation dimensions at "high".

required_actions.action: DENY HLD work.
Report to Planning Hub: "PRD must pass all 8 validation dimensions before HLD decomposition. Current PRD status: [describe]."
Recommend re-dispatching PRD agent to complete validation.

scenario.name: incremental_update
scenario.trigger: User wants to update existing HLD and user stories rather than full decomposition.

required_actions.action: Read existing plan/hld.md and plan/user-stories/*.md.
Identify what has changed in PRD or architecture that affects the HLD.
Update only the affected user stories and HLD sections.
Re-run all self-validation checks on the full artifact set (including unchanged sections) for consistency.
Check for new overlap or traceability breaks introduced by the update.
